**Water HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: loaded from the user-supplied `water.xyz` (DFT single-point on that geometry, no optimization). SCF converged in 7 cycles. HOMO = –8.6037183 eV; LUMO = +0.33695037 eV → gap = **8.9406687 eV**. No warnings were reported. Command used:  
`/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpm3txy2dm/live.json`
